In a small sauce pot, reduce veal stock to 500g over a low-medium heat.  Remove from heat and reserve.
In a large sauce pan, melt the butter then add onion and sweat until transluscent.  Lightly colored but not caramelized.
Add mushrooms in and cook until soft, ~5 mins
Add in garlic, salt, chicken powder, sugar, soy, pepper, and veal stock.  Let cook and reduce to a wet paste.
Add in ginger and scallion.  Remove from heat, then mix in the sesame oil.
Cool in blast chiller and store in qppropriate containers for use in Gyoza production.
